title: cordyline calocoma f. lentiginosa
intro: Cordyline calocoma f. lentiginosa, also known as the Ceylon lily or red velvet cordyline, is a tropical plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its striking red to purple-red foliage and tall, slender stems. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant protection. Cordyline calocoma f. lentiginosa is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer relief from various health issues.
